name: Fix TypeScript errors found by diagnostics
description: Run tsc, see type errors, fix them, re-run to verify clean build
task: Run TypeScript diagnostics on the project, fix any type errors you find, then re-run to confirm the build is clean.

mockCommandResponses.stdout:
src/math.ts(6,10): error TS2362: The left-hand side of an arithmetic operation must be of type 'any', 'number', 'bigint' or an enum type.
src/math.ts(6,14): error TS2363: The right-hand side of an arithmetic operation must be of type 'any', 'number', 'bigint' or an enum type.
src/math.ts(10,3): error TS2322: Type 'number' is not assignable to type 'string'.

turns.text: Fixed both type errors: changed `multiply`'s parameter `b` from `string` to `number`, and changed `divide`'s return type from `string` to `number`. Diagnostics now report a clean build.
